creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #0)

Things becoming clearer, since I expressed this in writing. As far as I can tell: 

* the shortcuts are effective if preceded by a click on a tab 

* the shortcuts are effective if preceded by a click within an e-mail 

* shortcuts are _not_ effective if preceded by a click on the 
  listing for an e-mail.
